description: Data sourced via yfinance / Yahoo Finance. Approximation.

observations.note: Computed via yfinance. Older quarters estimated from annual NI / 4. Earnings inflation-adjusted to current USD (CPIAUCSL). TE approximated as book equity (GW/IA not separately available). Approximation.

Annual historical observation. Market cap approximated from historical close price × current shares outstanding. TE uses current balance sheet (not historical). Earnings inflation-adjusted to current USD (CPIAUCSL). Approximation.
